[?25l[38;2;201;209;217m[48;2;1;4;9m[3;6HConnect to MCP before task activation. MCP URL: http://127.0.0.1:3741.[48;2;13;17;23m [48;2;1;4;9m[4;6HCall connect_agent with role="role-redacted", agentId="role-redacted", [5;6HterminalId="terminal-redacted", cli="opencode", [6;6HprofileId="role-redacted", sessionId="opencode:session-redacted", [7;6HruntimeSessionId="opencode:session-redacted", missionId="workflow-redacted-opencode-triple-id-redacted", nodeId="agent-redacted-a", attempt=1. [9;6HAfter connection, wait for NEW_TASK and run get_task_details. [38;2;188;140;255m[48;2;13;17;23m[12;6H▣  [38;2;201;209;217mBuild [38;2;139;148;158m· GLM-5.1[19;6H[?25h
